description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with coniferous trees. The front features a double garage with a paved driveway, a covered entryway, and a prominent bay window. The side elevations show additional windows and a mix of grass and paved walkways, while the rear includes a large set of windows and a small garden area. The roof has dormer windows and a chimney, adding architectural interest and natural light to the upper floor. The property is bordered by a wooden fence and has a well-maintained lawn on both sides. The overall design is reminiscent of modern suburban homes with traditional elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof, light exterior walls, a double garage, bay window, and landscaped yard enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway, bay window, driveway, and front lawn.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage side, sloped roof, side windows, and fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a small garden, and the back lawn enclosed by the fence.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional windows, roof details, and the continuation of the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and dormer windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a single front door, small overhang, and adjacent bay window
